title: After New York Elections, Israelis Fear Further Rupture in U.S.-Israeli Relationship
summary_full: Criticism of Israel’s war in Gaza, anger over the Iran war and election results in New York all suggest Israel’s solid support from Washington may be on borrowed time.
summary_public: Criticism of Israel’s war in Gaza, anger over the Iran war and election results in New York all suggest Israel’s solid support from Washington may be on borrowed time.

IL.label: positive
IL.evidence: Criticism of Israel’s war in Gaza
